zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期承压，震荡偏弱
zh.content:
目前以太坊/美元价格处于2204附近，较20日均线2222轻微下行，显示短期空头略占优势。日内高点2241和低点2197形成的区间震荡，意味着多空力量仍在博弈，短线趋势偏向承压整理。  

技术指标方面，MACD柱状保持正值27.24，但信号线缺失，表明动能尚存但缺乏明确方向。虽然价格低于SMA(20)，短期均线压力仍在，若价格未能重回均线上方，多头动力有限，反弹可能受阻。  

支撑位可关注2197及2180附近，若跌破可能加速下行；阻力位在2222和2240-2245区间，突破这些水平方可确认短期反弹。整体区间操作适合谨慎追涨，逢低可小幅建仓，严格设置止损以控制风险。  

交易策略上，短线投资者可关注SMA附近的回调做低多尝试，同时保持灵活止盈；激进交易者可等待MACD出现明确金叉信号再入场，以减少震荡风险。长期投资者应结合基本面与以太坊网络发展动态进行布局，避免单纯依赖技术指标操作。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
The current price of Ethereum (ETH/USD) stands at 2204.32, showing a slight decline of 1.46% over the past 24 hours. This downward movement suggests that the market may be in a short-term retracement phase. Ethereum has been oscillating within the range of 2241.3 (high) and 2197.56 (low), reflecting a consolidation period. The price appears to be testing support near the lower range, and if this level holds, there may be a potential for a rebound, potentially targeting the upper resistance level of 2241.3.

The absence of the RSI value limits the ability to assess the current momentum of the market. However, the MACD reading of 27.23612 provides some insight into a possible bullish bias, as the positive MACD suggests that the buying pressure is relatively stronger than selling at the moment. Without the signal line for confirmation, it is important to be cautious and monitor whether the MACD maintains its position or reverses, indicating a shift in trend.

The 20-period Simple Moving Average (SMA) at 2222.33 is currently acting as a potential resistance. If the price breaks above this level, it could signal the start of a more significant upward trend. Conversely, a failure to break through this level might see Ethereum continuing its sideways movement or testing lower support levels. Traders should watch for any close above or below the SMA as a possible signal to enter a position.

In terms of support, the immediate area around 2197.56 provides a crucial level to watch. If ETH/USD tests this support and bounces, it could present a favorable entry point for bullish traders. On the other hand, a breakdown below this support could see Ethereum heading towards a deeper correction. Traders may consider setting stop-loss orders below 2197.56 to manage risk, with targets aligned towards the next resistance levels.
